config.dcfixes.title: DeceasedCraft Fixes Config
config.dcfixes.category.gameplay.group.h: Settings related to the Hordes mod.
config.dcfixes.category.gameplay.group.t: Settings related to the TACZ mod.
config.dcfixes.category.gameplay.group.e: Gameplay-affecting settings for Extreme Reactors turbines.
config.dcfixes.category.gameplay.group.b: Settings related to the [Let's Do] Bakery mod.
Settings related to rendering of Immersive Vehicles.
config.dcfixes.category.performance.grou: Settings related to ticking behavior of Immersive Vehicles.
config.dcfixes.option.horde_waves_loaded:
Determines how far, in blocks, from the furthest loaded block to the player should the horde waves spawn.
Default: 32
config.dcfixes.option.render_player_shad:
Whether to render shadows for player entities when using shaders.
Default: True
config.dcfixes.option.iron_ammo_box_stac:
Set the stack count of iron ammo boxes. Set to -1 to disable this change.
Default: -1
config.dcfixes.option.gold_ammo_box_stac:
Set the stack count of gold ammo boxes. Set to -1 to disable this change.
Default: -1
config.dcfixes.option.diamond_ammo_box_s:
Set the stack count of diamond ammo boxes. Set to -1 to disable this change.
Default: -1
config.dcfixes.option.ragdoll_debug.desc:
Enable ragdoll part debug rendering and logging.
Default: False
config.dcfixes.option.frustum_cull_expan:
How much to expand the frustum culling box for IV entities
Default: 2.0
config.dcfixes.option.dormant_dynamic_ba:
The distance at which dynamic IV entities are rendered with static batching. The distance is calculated from the nearest player to the IV entity.
Default: 16.0
config.dcfixes.option.particle_spawn_dis:
The distance at which IV entities will spawn particles. The distance is calculated from the camera to the IV entity.
Default: 16.0
config.dcfixes.option.instrument_render_:
The distance at which IV instruments are rendered. The distance is calculated from the camera to the IV entity.
Default: 16.0
config.dcfixes.option.text_render_distan:
The distance at which IV text (e.g. number plates) is rendered. The distance is calculated from the camera to the IV entity.
Default: 32.0
config.dcfixes.option.dormant_ticking_di:
The distance at which motionless IV entities should be within relative to the nearest player to tick.
Default: 16.0
config.dcfixes.option.aircraft_always_ti:
Whether aircraft IV entities should always tick regardless of distance to a player.
Note: Aircraft will still not tick outside simulated distance if 'tick_outside_simulated_distance' is false.
Default: True
config.dcfixes.option.sugar_rush_movemen:
Effect applifier times this value is the movement speed bonus given by sugar rush.
Default: 0.05
config.dcfixes.option.sugar_rush_attack_:
Effect amplifier times this value is the attack speed bonus given by sugar rush.
Default: 0.5

Effect amplifier times this value is the attack damage bonus given by sugar rush.
Default: 1
